'''Gungis X Weapons''' was an arms manufacturing corporation in operation before the era of the [[Jedi Civil War]]. They were known for being credited with the development and manufacture of the first [[Blaster carbine/Legends|blaster carbine]]. Personal blaster carbines used by the famous mercenaries [[Jurgan Kalta]] and [[Jamoh Hogra]] were supposedly this model originally.

{{Company-stub}}
